challenge.title: Panga lebo za D3
challenge.description: D3 putanje mogu dodati stilove linijskim oznakama. Svojstvo elementa fill postavlja boju teksta za čvor text. Putanja style() postavlja pravila za CSS za druge stilove, kao što su font-family ili font-size.
challenge.instructions: Postavi font-size za elemente text da budu 25px, a boja teksta neka bude crvena.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<body>
  <script>
    const dataset = [12, 31, 22, 17, 25, 18, 29, 14, 9];

    const w = 500;
    const h = 100;

    const svg = d3
      .select('body')
      .append('svg')
      .attr('width', w)
      .attr('height', h);

    svg
      .selectAll('rect')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('rect')
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d)
      .attr('width', 25)
      .attr('height', (d, i) => d * 3)
      .attr('fill', 'navy');

    svg
      .selectAll('text')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('text')
      .text(d => d)
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d - 3);
    // Add your code below this line



    // Add your code above this line
  </script>
</body>

tests.text: Lebozote zinapaswa kuwa na rangi ya fill nyekundu.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<body>
  <script>
    const dataset = [
      [34, 78],
      [109, 280],
      [310, 120],
      [79, 411],
      [420, 220],
      [233, 145],
      [333, 96],
      [222, 333],
      [78, 320],
      [21, 123]
    ];

    const w = 500;
    const h = 500;
    const padding = 60;

    const xScale = d3
      .scaleLinear()
      .domain([0, d3.max(dataset, d => d[0])])
      .range([padding, w - padding]);

    const yScale = d3
      .scaleLinear()
      .domain([0, d3.max(dataset, d => d[1])])
      .range([h - padding, padding]);

    const svg = d3
      .select('body')
      .append('svg')
      .attr('width', w)
      .attr('height', h);

    svg
      .selectAll('circle')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('circle')
      .attr('cx', d => xScale(d[0]))
      .attr('cy', d => yScale(d[1]))
      .attr('r', d => 5);

    svg
      .selectAll('text')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('text')
      .text(d => d[0] + ',' + d[1])
      .attr('x', d => xScale(d[0] + 10))
      .attr('y', d => yScale(d[1]));

    const xAxis = d3.axisBottom(xScale);

    const yAxis = d3.axisLeft(yScale);

    svg
      .append('g')
      .attr('transform', 'translate(0,' + (h - padding) + ')')
      .call(xAxis);

    svg
      .append('g')
      .attr('transform', 'translate(' + padding + ',0)')
      .call(yAxis);
  </script>
</body>
